_description: Model derivations for Spain vs Belgium QF pricing (2026-07-10). No crowd/market data used by instruction -- this is model-only pricing, unlike most prior matches. Cross-referenced against 3 independent methods (ordered logit, Dixon-Coles bivariate grid, Monte Carlo path simulation) since there is no market to validate against this time.

poisson_goal_rates.note: SoFi Stadium is on US soil but neither Spain nor Belgium is USA/MX/CA, so neutral=true per project convention

blended_match_outcome.method: simple average of ordered logit and Dixon-Coles grid (no crowd/market available to blend with this time)

monte_carlo_simulation.method: independent Poisson goal counts per team, goal times sampled uniform(0, 93 min), tracks running score for path-dependent questions
monte_carlo_simulation.cross_check_note: sim win/draw/BTTS figures closely match the analytic Dixon-Coles grid (independent method agreement), giving confidence in both

shot_and_corner_thresholds.method: empirical-Bayes shrinkage of 2026 in-tournament rate toward 2018/2022 StatsBomb historical rate, k=5 pseudo-matches, then Poisson(shrunk mean) for threshold probability

referee.name: Michael Oliver
referee.source: web search (Fox Sports/OneFootball/khelnow), corroborated against our own ESPN data

yamal_prior.2026_record: 1 goal contribution in 4 games (vs weakest opponent only), 0 assists all tournament
yamal_prior.validated_precedent: Portugal-Spain 06_post_match_results.json: priced 0.30, settled NO, +38.48 RBP -- explicitly validated across virtually every match this tournament
yamal_prior.caution: this would be the 3rd consecutive match pricing the same underlying pattern on the same player -- reinforcement, not independent replication

de_bruyne_lukaku_r16_note.de_bruyne: 0 appearances in R16 vs USA -- genuine unused-squad DNP, not early substitution. Participation tonight is a live uncertainty, not resolvable from data.
de_bruyne_lukaku_r16_note.lukaku: subbed in 67', 1 shot/1 SOT/1 goal -- 3rd straight sub appearance with a goal, but full-tournament 1+SOT rate across all 5 appearances is 3/5=0.60, not a streak of perfect SOT games
